settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Standard shipping takes 7-15 business days to most countries. Express shipping (3-7 days) is available at checkout. You'll receive a tracking number by email once your order ships.

settings.question: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer free standard shipping worldwide on all orders. No minimum order required.

settings.question: Where do you ship from?
settings.answer: Our products are shipped from supplier warehouses in Asia. This allows us to offer premium products at accessible prices with worldwide delivery.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Once your order is shipped, you'll receive a tracking number via email.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy. If you're not completely satisfied, contact us within 30 days of receiving your order and we'll make it right.

settings.question: My item arrived damaged. What do I do?
settings.answer: Email support@pawlux.com with your order number and a photo of the damage. We'll send a replacement or issue a full refund.

settings.question: Are your products safe for pets?
settings.answer: Yes. Every product in our collection is carefully selected to meet international safety standards.

settings.question: What size carrier should I get for my cat?
settings.answer: Our Space Capsule Backpack fits cats up to 6kg (13 lbs). For dogs, measure your pet's length and height while seated.

settings.question: Is it safe to buy from PAWLUX?
settings.answer: Yes. Our store uses SSL encryption and is powered by Shopify. Your payment information is never stored.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

settings.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to know before you buy.
